7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 /* BodyForce.h (C) 2022-2025 */
9 /* */
10 /* Contains functions to compute and assemble body force contribution to RHS */
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
13 
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
31 inline void FemModuleElasticity::
32 _applyBodyForce(VariableDoFReal& rhs_values, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof)
33 {
34 
35  // no bodyforce to apply hence return
36  if (!m_applyBodyForce)
37  return;
38 
39  // apply bodyforce based on dimension and mesh type
40  if (mesh()->dimension() == 2)
41  {
42  if (m_hex_quad_mesh)
43  {
44  ENUMERATE_ (Cell, icell, allCells())
45  {
46  Cell cell = *icell;
47  Real3 f = m_cell_body_force[icell] ;
48 
49  constexpr Real gp[2] = { -M_SQRT1_3, M_SQRT1_3 }; //(ξ,η)
50  constexpr Real weights[2] = { 1.0, 1.0 };
51 
52  for (Int32 ixi = 0; ixi < 2; ++ixi) {
53  for (Int32 ieta = 0; ieta < 2; ++ieta) {
54 
55  // set the coordinates of the Gauss point
56  Real xi = gp[ixi]; // Get the ξ coordinate of the Gauss point
57  Real eta = gp[ieta]; // Get the η coordinate of the Gauss point
58 
59  // set the weight of the Gauss point
60  Real weight = weights[ixi] * weights[ieta];
61 
62  // get shape functions 𝐍 for Quad4: 𝐍(ξ,η) = [𝑁₁ 𝑁₂ 𝑁₃ 𝑁₄]
63  RealVector<4> N = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D::computeShapeFunctionsQuad4(xi, eta);
64 
65  // get determinant of Jacobian
66  const auto gp_info = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D::computeGradientsAndJacobianQuad4(cell, m_node_coord, xi, eta);
67  const Real detJ = gp_info.det_j;
68 
69  // compute integration weight
70  Real integration_weight = weight * detJ;
71 
72  // Assemble RHS
73  for (Int32 i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
74  Node node = cell.node(i);
75  if (node.isOwn()) {
76  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += N[i] * f[0] * integration_weight;
77  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += N[i] * f[1] * integration_weight;
78  }
79  }
80  }
81  }
82  }
83  }
84  else {
85  ENUMERATE_ (Cell, icell, allCells()) {
86  Cell cell = *icell;
87  Real3 f = m_cell_body_force[icell] ;
88  Real area = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeAreaTria3(cell, m_node_coord);
89  for (Node node : cell.nodes()) {
90  if (node.isOwn()) {
91  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += f[0] * area / 3;
92  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += f[1] * area / 3;
93  }
94  }
95  }
96  }
97  }
98  if (mesh()->dimension() == 3)
99  {
100  if (m_hex_quad_mesh)
101  {
102  ENUMERATE_ (Cell, icell, allCells())
103  {
104  Cell cell = *icell;
105 
106  Real3 f = m_cell_body_force[icell] ;
107 
108  constexpr Real gp[2] = { -M_SQRT1_3, M_SQRT1_3 }; // [-1/sqrt(3), 1/sqrt(3)]
109  constexpr Real weights[2] = { 1.0, 1.0 };
110 
111  for (Int32 ixi = 0; ixi < 2; ++ixi) {
112  for (Int32 ieta = 0; ieta < 2; ++ieta) {
113  for (Int32 izeta = 0; izeta < 2; ++izeta) {
114 
115  // set the coordinates of the Gauss point
116  Real xi = gp[ixi];
117  Real eta = gp[ieta];
118  Real zeta = gp[izeta];
119 
120  // set the weight of the Gauss point
121  Real weight = weights[ixi] * weights[ieta] * weights[izeta];
122 
123  // Get shape functions for Hexa8: 𝐍(ξ,η,ζ) = [𝑁₁ 𝑁₂ 𝑁₃ 𝑁₄ 𝑁₅ 𝑁₆ 𝑁₇ 𝑁₈]
124  RealVector<8> N = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeShapeFunctionsHexa8(xi, eta, zeta);
125 
126  // get determinant of Jacobian
127  const auto gp_info = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientsAndJacobianHexa8(cell, m_node_coord, xi, eta, zeta);
128  const Real detJ = gp_info.det_j;
129 
130  // compute integration weight
131  Real integration_weight = detJ * weight;
132 
133  // Assemble RHS
134  for (Int32 i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
135  Node node = cell.node(i);
136  if (node.isOwn()) {
137  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += N[i] * f[0] * integration_weight;
138  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += N[i] * f[1] * integration_weight;
139  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 2)] += N[i] * f[2] * integration_weight;
140  }
141  }
142  }
143  }
144  }
145  }
146  }
147  else
148  {
149  ENUMERATE_ (Cell, icell, allCells())
150  {
151  Cell cell = *icell;
152  Real3 f = m_cell_body_force[icell] ;
153 
154  Real volume = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeVolumeTetra4(cell, m_node_coord);
155  for (Node node : cell.nodes()) {
156  if (node.isOwn()) {
157  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 0)] += f[0] * volume / 4;
158  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 1)] += f[1] * volume / 4;
159  rhs_values[node_dof.dofId(node, 2)] += f[2] * volume / 4;
160  }
161  }
162  }
163  }
164  }
165 }
ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D::computeShapeFunctionsQuad4
static RealVector< 4 > computeShapeFunctionsQuad4(Real xi, Real eta)
Computes the shape functions for a Quad4 element at a given point (ξ, η).
Definition: ArcaneFemFunctions.h:753
ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D::computeGradientsAndJacobianQuad4
static Quad4GaussPointInfo computeGradientsAndJacobianQuad4(Cell cell, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord, Real xi, Real eta)
Computes shape function gradients and the Jacobian determinant for a Quad4 element.
Definition: ArcaneFemFunctions.h:652
ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeShapeFunctionsHexa8
static RealVector< 8 > computeShapeFunctionsHexa8(Real xi, Real eta, Real zeta)
Computes the shape functions for a Hexa8 element at a given point (ξ,η,ζ).
Definition: ArcaneFemFunctions.h:1137
ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientsAndJacobianHexa8
static Hexa8GaussPointInfo computeGradientsAndJacobianHexa8(Cell cell, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord, Real xi, Real eta, Real zeta)
Computes shape function gradients and the Jacobian determinant for a Hexa8 element.
Definition: ArcaneFemFunctions.h:988
ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeAreaTria3
static Real computeAreaTria3(ItemWithNodes item, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord)
Computes the area of a triangle defined by three nodes.
Definition: ArcaneFemFunctions.h:152
ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeVolumeTetra4
static Real computeVolumeTetra4(ItemWithNodes item, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord)
Computes the volume of a tetrahedra defined by four nodes.
Definition: ArcaneFemFunctions.h:128
ItemT< Arcane::Cell >
Definition: ItemOld.h:66
ItemT< Arcane::Node >
Definition: ItemOld.h:98
Real3
Real3 : un point reel en trois dimensions.
